name: Audio Dataset Curation
short_description: Collect, clean, annotate, and DVC-track production audio clips for STT experiments.
detailed_description: Covers tasks that source audio from Rezolve production logs or the rail-artifacts voice samples repository, apply quality filtering, annotate ground-truth transcripts and entity spans, and version the result with DVC against the Azure Blob remote. Unlike download-dataset (which fetches public, pre-labeled sets), this type involves human or LLM-assisted labelling of proprietary audio. Gold-92 curation and any future production audio expansion tasks belong here.
